title: Nicotine
summary: a mild chemical stimulant naturally found in some plants

content_blocks.body_md:
Nicotine is the stimulant that makes tobacco addictive, and one of the
fastest-clearing drugs people use: its half-life is only about two hours, part
of why cravings return so quickly. In the plant it is a natural pesticide.
